Aspect Model CBAM

urn:samm:io.catenax.cbam:0.1.0#Cbam

Übersicht

Properties

company identifier

Object with attributes describing the identifiers of the two business exchanging this dataset, namely the requesting and the responding company.
Name
companyIds
Characteristic
SingleEntity
Typ urn:samm:io.catenax.cbam:0.1.0#CompanyIdsEntity
Optional
Nein
Im Payload
Ja
Payload Schlüssel
companyIds

good

Array of good records to be reported. Each good record represents one declared good instance identified by CN Code and business transaction details and contains the CBAM-related information for that declared good.
Name
good
Characteristic
List
Sortierung
Erlaubt Duplikate
Typ urn:samm:io.catenax.cbam:0.1.0#GoodEntity
Optional
Nein
Im Payload
Ja
Payload Schlüssel
good

requested elements

List of element identifiers that define the scope of objects and/or data attributes requested for inclusion in the supplier response. The identifiers refer to sections and attributes defined in the corresponding request type schemes, and indicate which parts of the data model are expected to be provided in the response (subject to the rules of the respective response schema, e.g., mandatory fields and conditional dependencies).
Name
requestedElements
Characteristic
Typ http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string
Beispiel
associatedReferenceDocument, operatorIdentification, operatorActivityData
Optional
Nein
Im Payload
Ja
Payload Schlüssel
requestedElements

Objekt

carbon price paid entity

Properties

type of instrument

Attribute describing the form of carbon price, also referred to as type of instrument. The values are defined as: 01 Carbon tax, 02 Carbon levy, 03 Carbon fee, 04 National Emissions Trading System, 05 Regional Emissions Trading System, 06 Other.
Name
typeOfInstrument
Characteristic
Typ http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string
Beispiel
01
Optional
Nein
Im Payload
Ja
Payload Schlüssel
typeOfInstrument
independend person identifier

Identifier of the independent person issuing a payment statement about the carbon price paid by the direct supplier or any other tier-n supplier in the value chain.
Name
independendPersonId
Characteristic
List
Sortierung
Erlaubt Duplikate
Typ urn:samm:io.catenax.cbam:0.1.0#KeyValueEntity
Optional
Nein
Im Payload
Ja
Payload Schlüssel
independendPersonId
description and indication of legal act

Reference the description of the underlying legal act according to which the carbon price was paid.
Name
descriptionAndIndicationOfLegalAct
Characteristic
Typ http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string
Beispiel
Country ABC National Carbon Tax Act 2022
Optional
Nein
Im Payload
Ja
Payload Schlüssel
descriptionAndIndicationOfLegalAct
amount of carbon price paid

Monetary value of the paid carbon price.
Name
amountOfCarbonPricePaid
Characteristic
Typ http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#float
Beispiel
12000.0
Optional
Nein
Im Payload
Ja
Payload Schlüssel
amountOfCarbonPricePaid
currency

currency code according to ISO 4217.
Name
currency
Characteristic
Trait
Referenz
Typ http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string
Beispiel
EUR
Optional
Nein
Im Payload
Ja
Payload Schlüssel
currency

    Beschreibung
    ISO 4217 regex
    Referenz
    • https://www.iso.org/iso-4217-currency-codes.html
    Regulärer Ausdruck
    ^[A-Z]{3}$

good entity

Properties

operator

One or multiple objects containing attributes that describe an operator each that legally owns the installations producing the CBAM good that is subject of this request. Operator can be different to supplier. One supplier (business partner of this transaction) can source the good defined in the business transaction from other suppliers. This can result in multiple operators (mutliple operator objects) involved in the depicted supply chain.
Name
operator
Characteristic
List
Sortierung
Erlaubt Duplikate
Typ urn:samm:io.catenax.cbam:0.1.0#OperatorEntity
Optional
Nein
Im Payload
Ja
Payload Schlüssel
operator
business transaction details

Object describing the specific business transaction between the customer (e.g. importer) and the supplier, so the request can be mapped to a real transaction.
Name
businessTransactionDetails
Characteristic
SingleEntity
Typ urn:samm:io.catenax.cbam:0.1.0#BusinessTransactionDetailsEntity
Optional
Nein
Im Payload
Ja
Payload Schlüssel
businessTransactionDetails
product description

Free text describing the product and any characteristics that help identify the right business transaction per request.
Name
productDescription
Characteristic
Typ http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string
Beispiel
Hot-rolled steel coil, grade S235JR
Optional
Nein
Im Payload
Ja
Payload Schlüssel
productDescription
product identifier
Name
productIds
Characteristic
List
Sortierung
Erlaubt Duplikate
Typ urn:samm:io.catenax.cbam:0.1.0#KeyValueEntity
Optional
Ja
Im Payload
Ja
Payload Schlüssel
productIds
CN code

This is the 8-digit CN code (combined nomenclature) of the reported good, refering to official CBAM value list to ensure updated content.
Name
cnCode
Characteristic
Trait
Referenz
Typ http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string
Beispiel
72011000
Optional
Nein
Im Payload
Ja
Payload Schlüssel
cnCode
Bedingungen
  • CN code length constraint
    Min. Zeichen
    8
    Max. Zeichen
    8

indirect emissions entity

Properties

source of emission factor

Declaration of applied literature or published information by the statistics office, according to following allowed values: 01 Other, 02 Commission based on IEA data.
Name
sourceOfEmissionFactor
Characteristic
Typ http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string
Beispiel
02
Optional
Nein
Im Payload
Ja
Payload Schlüssel
sourceOfEmissionFactor
emission factor tonnes CO2 per Mwh

This element declares the applied emission factor for electricity, expressed as tonnes CO2 per MWh.
Name
emissionFactorTonnesCo2PerMwh
Characteristic
Typ http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#float
Beispiel
0.45
Optional
Nein
Im Payload
Ja
Payload Schlüssel
emissionFactorTonnesCo2PerMwh
source of emission factor value

Any additional information detailing the source of the emissions value.
Name
sourceOfEmissionFactorValue
Characteristic
Typ http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string
Beispiel
IEA 2022 Electricity Report
Optional
Nein
Im Payload
Ja
Payload Schlüssel
sourceOfEmissionFactorValue
specific embedded emission indirect

Value of the indirect embedded emissions, expressed in tonnes of CO₂ equivalents per tonne of product, calculated with reference to the specific production method and installation.
Name
specificEmbeddedEmissionIndirect
Characteristic
Typ http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#float
Beispiel
0.25
Optional
Nein
Im Payload
Ja
Payload Schlüssel
specificEmbeddedEmissionIndirect
electricity consumed Mwh per tonnes good

Value of the consumed electricity, expressed as MWh per tonne of good.
Name
electricityConsumedMwhPerTonnesGood
Characteristic
Typ http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#float
Beispiel
0.6
Optional
Nein
Im Payload
Ja
Payload Schlüssel
electricityConsumedMwhPerTonnesGood
source of electricity

Describes the source of the electricity according to the official value list: SOE01 Direct technical link to electricity generator, SOE02 (Bilateral) power purchase agreement, SOE03 Received from the grid.
Name
sourceOfElectricity
Characteristic
Typ http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string
Beispiel
SOE03
Optional
Nein
Im Payload
Ja
Payload Schlüssel
sourceOfElectricity

operator entity

Properties

transaction reference document link

Pointer to a reference document previously provided in businessTransactionDetails, optionally refined to a specific part/item of that document, to indicate which document (and which part of it) the operator-related response data corresponds to.
Name
transactionReferenceDocumentLink
Characteristic
SingleEntity
Typ urn:samm:io.catenax.cbam:0.1.0#TransactionReferenceDocumentLink
Optional

Object containing attributes to identify the operator.

Characteristic
SingleEntity
Typ urn:samm:io.catenax.cbam:0.1.0#OperatorIdentificationEntity
Optional
Nein
Im Payload
Ja
Payload Schlüssel
operatorIdentification
installation

One or more objects describing each installation producing the CBAM good that is the subject of this request. A single operator may own multiple installations supplying the CBAM good in this request; in that case, multiple installation objects are provided. Each installation may include multiple production methods.
Name
installation
Characteristic
List
Sortierung
Erlaubt Duplikate
Typ urn:samm:io.catenax.cbam:0.1.0#InstallationEntity
Optional
Nein
Im Payload
Ja
Payload Schlüssel
installation

transaction reference document link

Properties

reference document element

Additional locator/metadata to identify a specific element within the referenced document (e.g., line item, position number, material code, annex section). Used when the document covers multiple goods/operators and you need to specify which part applies.
Name
refDocElement
Characteristic
List
Sortierung
Erlaubt Duplikate
Typ urn:samm:io.catenax.cbam:0.1.0#KeyValueEntity
Optional
Nein
Im Payload
Ja
Payload Schlüssel
refDocElement
reference document identifier

Identifier of the referenced document; must match the corresponding reference document value from the request.
Name
refDocId
Characteristic
Typ http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string
Beispiel
INV-2024-12345
Optional
Nein
Im Payload
Ja
Payload Schlüssel
refDocId
reference document type

Type of the referenced document; must match a reference document type from the business transaction details object in the request.
Name
refDocType
Characteristic
Typ http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string
Beispiel
invoice
Optional
Nein
Im Payload
Ja
Payload Schlüssel
refDocType
